name: Torbal the Sufficient
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wears leather cuirass and greaves, carrying a leather shield. Armed with a fine steel dagger, an enchanted bow, and leveled enchanted arrows (plus one iron arrow).
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: early-riser, helpful, simple, hunter
Role: Torbal the Sufficient is a hunter living in Brindle Home. Like the other residents, Astante and Merildor, he will point people in the direction of Melus Petilius' house if they need help finding it.
Home Location Information: Brindle Home, a small settlement.
Daily Routine: Torbal believes in "early to bed, early to rise." He sleeps in his house from 8pm until 2am. He spends the rest of the day exploring the town and vicinities of Brindle Home.
Personality - The Simple Hunter: Torbal lives a straightforward life as a hunter in the small settlement of Brindle Home. He keeps early hours and spends his days exploring the area. He is helpful to visitors, willing to provide directions when needed.
author: Bethesda
